text.title: Strategy Analysis Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-strategy-analysis.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

forbidden.pattern: Business need is a one-line slogan ('Become the leader').
Current and future state are described in symmetric prose without measurable delta.
